compiled_state.title: Write prefill-config.sh unit tests with stack fixtures (RED)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh with test functions verifying the prefill-config.sh contract:

1. test_node_prefill — Given a temp dir with package.json (detect-stack returns node-npm), When prefill-config.sh runs, Then dso-config.conf contains: commands.test_runner=npx jest, commands.lint=npx eslint ., commands.format=npx prettier --write ., commands.format_check=npx prettier --check .
2. test_ruby_prefill — Given a temp dir with Gemfile (detect-stack returns ruby-rails/ruby-jekyll), When prefill-config.sh runs, Then dso-config.conf contains appropriate Ruby defaults
3. test_rust_prefill — Given a temp dir with Cargo.toml (detect-stack returns rust-cargo), When prefill-config.sh runs, Then dso-config.conf contains commands.* keys with empty string and inline comment
4. test_unknown_prefill — Given no stack markers, When prefill-config.sh runs, Then dso-config.conf contains commands.* keys with empty string and inline comment
5. test_rerun_preservation — Given dso-config.conf with commands.test_runner=my-custom-cmd, When prefill-config.sh runs, Then commands.test_runner is unchanged AND stdout contains [DSO INFO] commands.test_runner already set
6. test_python_prefill — Given pyproject.toml, Then dso-config.conf has Python defaults

Use fixture directories with appropriate stack marker files. Tests FAIL (RED) on current codebase because prefill-config.sh does not yet exist.

## Files to Modify
- tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add entry and RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh
- [ ] Test contains at least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] Test FAILS on current codebase
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh
- [ ] .test-index maps prefill-config.sh to test-prefill-config.sh with RED markers
  Verify: grep 'prefill-config' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-prefill-config'

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT: RED tests written and verified.

Files created/modified:
- tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh (CREATE, executable) — 6 test functions
- .test-index (EDIT) — added entry with 6 RED markers for prefill-config.sh

All 4 AC pass:
1. test -x → PASS
2. 6+ test functions (12 function definitions) → PASS  
3. Tests FAIL on current codebase (PASSED: 0 FAILED: 6, exit 1) → PASS
4. .test-index maps prefill-config.sh to test-prefill-config.sh → PASS

Ready for GREEN phase (prefill-config.sh implementation).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/unit/scripts/test-prefill-config.sh (created), .test-index (RED markers). All 6 tests fail RED.
